fields.label: Images
fields.name: slider_images
fields.instructions: Upload gallery images. In default mode, the first image displays large with thumbnails below. In grid-only mode, all images display as equal-sized thumbnails.

fields.label: Grid Only (no large preview image)
fields.name: grid_only
fields.instructions: Enable to show only the thumbnail grid without a large preview image above. Images open in lightbox when clicked.
